items.title: How Norway’s Wealth Fund Exit Impacts the 2025 Value Case for Caterpillar
items.description: If you are wondering whether to hold onto your Caterpillar shares, take profits, or jump in for the first time, you are not alone. Caterpillar’s stock has been on a remarkable journey, climbing an impressive 242.7% over the past five years and up nearly 200% over three years. More recently, returns have been solid, with a 21% increase in the past year and a strong 29.5% year-to-date. But in the past week, the stock has slipped just slightly, down 0.2%. This serves as a reminder that no climb...

items.title: Tariffs Aren’t Hitting Earnings—Yet. Why That Might Not Last.
items.description: The bottom line is that aggregate corporate margins remain at high levels, and consumers have been largely shielded from rising prices.
